case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. PEDRO AREVALO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,191.71 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DUPLICATE COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE RECEIVED AND FILED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT HAS PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUL-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, PEDRO

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT AREVALO, PEDRO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-18-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--PUBIC INFO. OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY ELLEN ROSENTHAL--SPANISH INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE TODAY.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
